Run health checks on the project (bun, config, theme, content, network)

Usage:
  nectar doctor [--config <path>] [--json] [--no-network]

Options:
  --config <path>     Path to a config file; disables discovery when set
  --json              Emit results as JSON (for CI consumption)
  --no-network        Skip the network reachability check
  -h, --help          Show help for this command

Environment variables:
  Every flag has an env var fallback (CLI flag > env var > config > default).
  Naming: NECTAR_<COMMAND>_<FLAG> (uppercased, dashes become underscores).
  Example: --config → NECTAR_DOCTOR_CONFIG

Examples:
  nectar doctor                                # full project health check
  nectar doctor --no-network                   # skip the connectivity probe
  nectar doctor --json                         # machine-readable for CI
